  Manages a per-project T4O setting (a WLM key/value, e.g. an email-notification address). Settings are keyed by name, so the resource id is the setting name. Do not use this to manage WLM-internal settings such as trust_id — those are reserved and rejected.

# t4o_setting (Resource)

Manages a per-project T4O setting (a WLM key/value, e.g. an email-notification address). Settings are keyed by `name`, so the resource `id` is the setting name. **Do not** use this to manage WLM-internal settings such as `trust_id` — those are reserved and rejected.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Setting name (unique per project). Changing forces recreation.
- `value` (String) Setting value.

### Optional

- `category` (String) Setting category.
- `description` (String) Human-readable description.
- `type` (String) Setting type hint (e.g. `email`, `string`). Defaults to what WLM stores.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Setting name (settings are name-keyed).
